matchupId.description: The unique identifier for the matchup

weekId.description: The week of the NFL season for this matchup

awayTeamId.description: The unique identifier for the away team

homeTeamId.description: The unique identifier for the home team

awayTeamCode.description: The abbreviation for the away team

homeTeamCode.description: The abbreviation for the home team

projectedWinner.description: The projected winner of the matchup (either 'home' or 'away')

projectionCorrect.description: Whether the projection for the matchup was correct
